summary: Full backend + frontend testing of NetScan (Mini Nessus). 11/11 backend pytest cases passed (root metadata, scan-types, validation incl. dangerous flags, scan lifecycle quick→completed on 127.0.0.1, history no _id leak, custom flags, delete→404). Mobile-web E2E flow worked end-to-end: hero+nmap-status visible, 6 scan-type cards rendered, target pre-filled with 'scanme.nmap.org', selecting 'Custom Flags' reveals custom-flags-input, executing a quick scan against 127.0.0.1 navigated to /scan/[id], status pill polled to COMPLETED, finding/host/ports rendered, raw output shown, history tab listed scans and item click navigated to detail, about tab shows capabilities + legal.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' from react-native-web. Cosmetic, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses asyncio.create_task without storing references - fine here since DB state owns lifecycle, but task could be GC'd in low-load scenarios; consider keeping a set of running tasks.

build_flags allows arbitrary tokens for custom scans (only blocks ;&|`$<>\"'). User could pass -iL or --script which read files / run NSE. Acceptable for a self-hosted tool but worth noting; could whitelist flag prefixes if hardening is desired.
Pydantic .dict() is deprecated in v2 (use .model_dump()); functional but emits warnings.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handler.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient scans on 127.0.0.1 and clean up via DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://nmap-scanner-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Use 127.0.0.1 as scan target inside container (port 3000 metro and 8080 are open and produce parseable results in ~0-1s). Tabs route at '/', '/history', '/about' and detail at '/scan/{id}'. testIDs: hero-box, nmap-status, target-input, scan-type-{quick|full|service|os|intense|custom}, custom-flags-input, start-scan-btn, scan-status, finding-{i}, host-{i}, port-{hi}-{pi}, raw-output, delete-scan-btn, history-list, history-item-{id}.
